method: Offline FAISS top-5 retrieval diagnostic on eval questions with joinable free-text gold chunks (vector+hybrid expected). error=1 if no gold chunk_id appears in top-5. Length bucket = total gold evidence characters / chunk count. Source type = majority source field of gold chunks.
